case_title: GREGORY W COFFEY VS. VILMA R. ACOSTA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COFFEY, GREGORY W IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ACOSTA, VILMA R. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75 SERVED DEC-15-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, VILMA R.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-16-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF GREGORY W. COFFEE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VILMA R. ACOSTA IS PRESENT. COURT IS AWAITING DECLARATIONS TO BE FILED BY THE PLAINTIFF FROM HIS REALTOR AND ANY FILED RESPONSE BY THE DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELLE MCGILL; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2024 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY COFFEY, GREGORY W ACOSTA, VILMA R.
DECLARATION OF CASEY BELWAY RE: EXISTING TENANCIES FILED BY PLAINTIFF COFFEY, GREGORY W
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER COFFEY, GREGORY W
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY COFFEY, GREGORY W AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, VILMA R. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
